chapters.zh: 亚当生塞特；塞特生以挪士；
chapters.en: Adam, Sheth, Enosh,

chapters.zh: 以挪士生该南；该南生玛勒列；玛勒列生雅列；
chapters.en: Kenan, Mahalaleel, Jered,

chapters.zh: 雅列生以诺；以诺生玛土撒拉；玛土撒拉生拉麦；
chapters.en: Henoch, Methuselah, Lamech,

chapters.zh: 拉麦生挪亚；挪亚生闪、含、雅弗。
chapters.en: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

chapters.zh: 雅弗的儿子是歌篾、玛各、玛代、雅完、土巴、米设、提拉。
chapters.en: The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

chapters.zh: 歌篾的儿子是亚实基拿、低法 ( 创十章三节作利法 )、陀迦玛。
chapters.en: And the sons of Gomer; Ashchenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.

chapters.zh: 雅完的儿子是以利沙、他施、基提、多单 ( 有作罗单的 )。
chapters.en: And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.

chapters.zh: 含的儿子是古实、麦西、弗、迦南。
chapters.en: The sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

chapters.zh: 古实的儿子是西巴、哈腓拉、撒弗他、拉玛、撒弗提迦。拉玛的儿子是示巴、底但。
chapters.en: And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.

chapters.zh: 古实生宁录；他为世上英雄之首。
chapters.en: And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be mighty upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 麦西生路低人、亚拿米人、利哈比人、拿弗土希人、
chapters.en: And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,

chapters.zh: 帕斯鲁细人、迦斯路希人、迦斐托人；从迦斐托出来的有非利士人。
chapters.en: And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (of whom came the Philistines,) and Caphthorim.

chapters.zh: 迦南生长子西顿，又生赫
chapters.en: And Canaan begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth,

chapters.zh: 和耶布斯人、亚摩利人、革迦撒人、
chapters.en: The Jebusite also, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,

chapters.zh: 希未人、亚基人、西尼人、
chapters.en: And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,

chapters.zh: 亚瓦底人、洗玛利人，并哈马人。
chapters.en: And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.

chapters.zh: 闪的儿子是以拦、亚述、亚法撒、路德、亚兰、乌斯、户勒、基帖、米设 ( 创十23作玛施 )。
chapters.en: The sons of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.

chapters.zh: 亚法撒生沙拉；沙拉生希伯。
chapters.en: And Arphaxad begat Shelah, and Shelah begat Eber.

chapters.zh: 希伯生了两个儿子：一个名叫法勒 ( 就是分的意思 )，因为那时人就分地居住；法勒的兄弟名叫约坍。
chapters.en: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one Peleg; because in his days the earth was divided: and his brother's name Joktan.

chapters.zh: 约坍生亚摩答、沙列、哈萨玛非、耶拉、
chapters.en: And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,

chapters.zh: 哈多兰、乌萨、德拉、
chapters.en: Hadoram also, and Uzal, and Diklah,

chapters.zh: 以巴录、亚比玛利、示巴、
chapters.en: And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,

chapters.zh: 阿斐、哈腓拉、约巴。这都是约坍的儿子。
chapters.en: And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these the sons of Joktan.

chapters.zh: 闪生亚法撒；亚法撒生沙拉；
chapters.en: Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,

chapters.zh: 沙拉生希伯；希伯生法勒；法勒生拉吴；
chapters.en: Eber, Peleg, Reu,

chapters.zh: 拉吴生西鹿；西鹿生拿鹤；拿鹤生他拉；
chapters.en: Serug, Nahor, Terah,

chapters.zh: 他拉生亚伯兰，亚伯兰就是亚伯拉罕。
chapters.en: Abram; the same Abraham.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕的儿子是以撒、以实玛利。
chapters.en: The sons of Abraham; Isaac, and Ishmael.

chapters.zh: 以实玛利的儿子记在下面：以实玛利的长子是尼拜约，其次是基达、押德别、米比衫、
chapters.en: These their generations: The firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

chapters.zh: 米施玛、度玛、玛撒、哈达、提玛、
chapters.en: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,

chapters.zh: 伊突、拿非施、基底玛。这都是以实玛利的儿子。
chapters.en: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕的妾基土拉所生的儿子，就是心兰、约珊、米但、米甸、伊施巴、书亚。约珊的儿子是示巴、底但。
chapters.en: Now the sons of Keturah, Abraham's concubine: she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan; Sheba, and Dedan.

chapters.zh: 米甸的儿子是以法、以弗、哈诺、亚比大、以勒大。这都是基土拉的子孙。
chapters.en: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these the sons of Keturah.

chapters.zh: 亚伯拉罕生以撒；以撒的儿子是以扫和以色列。
chapters.en: And Abraham begat Isaac. The sons of Isaac; Esau and Israel.

chapters.zh: 以扫的儿子是以利法、流珥、耶乌施、雅兰、可拉。
chapters.en: The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.

chapters.zh: 以利法的儿子是提幔、阿抹、洗玻、迦坦、基纳斯、亭纳、亚玛力。
chapters.en: The sons of Eliphaz; Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.

chapters.zh: 流珥的儿子是拿哈、谢拉、沙玛、米撒。
chapters.en: The sons of Reuel; Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

chapters.zh: 西珥的儿子是罗坍、朔巴、祭便、亚拿、底顺、以察、底珊。
chapters.en: And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.

chapters.zh: 罗坍的儿子是何利、荷幔；罗坍的妹子是亭纳。
chapters.en: And the sons of Lotan; Hori, and Homam: and Timna Lotan's sister.

chapters.zh: 朔巴的儿子是亚勒文、玛拿辖、以巴录、示非、阿南。祭便的儿子是亚雅、亚拿。
chapters.en: The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.

chapters.zh: 亚拿的儿子是底顺。底顺的儿子是哈默兰、伊是班、益兰、基兰。
chapters.en: The sons of Anah; Dishon. And the sons of Dishon; Amram, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.

chapters.zh: 以察的儿子是辟罕、撒番、亚干。底珊的儿子是乌斯、亚兰。
chapters.en: The sons of Ezer; Bilhan, and Zavan, Jakan. The sons of Dishan; Uz, and Aran.

chapters.zh: 以色列人未有君王治理之先，在以东地作王的记在下面：有比珥的儿子比拉，他的京城名叫亭哈巴。
chapters.en: Now these the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before king reigned over the children of Israel; Bela the son of Beor: and the name of his city Dinhabah.

chapters.zh: 比拉死了，波斯拉人谢拉的儿子约巴接续他作王。
chapters.en: And when Bela was dead, Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 约巴死了，提幔地的人户珊接续他作王。
chapters.en: And when Jobab was dead, Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 户珊死了，比达的儿子哈达接续他作王。这哈达就是在摩押地杀败米甸人的，他的京城名叫亚未得。
chapters.en: And when Husham was dead, Hadad the son of Bedad, which smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city Avith.

chapters.zh: 哈达死了，玛士利加人桑拉接续他作王。
chapters.en: And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 桑拉死了，大河边的利河伯人扫罗接续他作王。
chapters.en: And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 扫罗死了，亚革波的儿子巴勒哈南接续他作王。
chapters.en: And when Shaul was dead, Baalhanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 巴勒哈南死了，哈达接续他作王。他的京城名叫巴伊，他的妻子名叫米希他别，是米萨合的孙女，玛特列的女儿。
chapters.en: And when Baalhanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city Pai; and his wife's name Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.

chapters.zh: 哈达死了，以东人的族长有亭纳族长、亚勒瓦族长、耶帖族长、
chapters.en: Hadad died also. And the dukes of Edom were; duke Timnah, duke Aliah, duke Jetheth,

chapters.zh: 亚何利巴玛族长、以拉族长、比嫩族长、
chapters.en: Duke Aholibamah, duke Elah, duke Pinon,

chapters.zh: 基纳斯族长、提幔族长、米比萨族长、
chapters.en: Duke Kenaz, duke Teman, duke Mibzar,

chapters.zh: 玛基叠族长、以兰族长。这都是以东人的族长。
chapters.en: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram. These the dukes of Edom.

chapters.zh: 以色列的儿子是流便、西缅、利未、犹大、以萨迦、西布伦、
chapters.en: These the sons of Israel; Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun,

chapters.zh: 但、约瑟、便雅悯、拿弗他利、迦得、亚设。
chapters.en: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

chapters.zh: 犹大的儿子是珥、俄南、示拉，这三人是迦南人书亚女儿所生的。犹大的长子珥在耶和华眼中看为恶，耶和华就使他死了。
chapters.en: The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the LORD; and he slew him.

chapters.zh: 犹大的儿妇他玛给犹大生法勒斯和谢拉。犹大共有五个儿子。
chapters.en: And Tamar his daughter in law bare him Pharez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah five.

chapters.zh: 法勒斯的儿子是希斯仑、哈母勒。
chapters.en: The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.

chapters.zh: 谢拉的儿子是心利、以探、希幔、甲各、大拉 ( 即达大 )，共五人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Zerah; Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.

chapters.zh: 迦米的儿子是亚干，这亚干在当灭的物上犯了罪，连累了以色列人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Carmi; Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the thing accursed.

chapters.zh: 以探的儿子是亚撒利雅 .。
chapters.en: And the sons of Ethan; Azariah.

chapters.zh: 希斯仑所生的儿子是耶拉篾、兰、基路拜。
chapters.en: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.

chapters.zh: 兰生亚米拿达；亚米拿达生拿顺。拿顺作犹大人的首领。
chapters.en: And Ram begat Amminadab; and Amminadab begat Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;

chapters.zh: 拿顺生撒门；撒门生波阿斯；
chapters.en: And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,

chapters.zh: 波阿斯生俄备得；俄备得生耶西；
chapters.en: And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,

chapters.zh: 耶西生长子以利押，次子亚比拿达，三子示米亚 ( 即沙玛，见撒上十六章九节 )，
chapters.en: And Jesse begat his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,

chapters.zh: 四子拿坦业，五子拉代，
chapters.en: Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,

chapters.zh: 六子阿鲜，七子大卫。
chapters.en: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh:

chapters.zh: 他们的姊妹是洗鲁雅和亚比该。洗鲁雅的儿子是亚比筛、约押、亚撒黑，共三人。
chapters.en: Whose sisters Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.

chapters.zh: 亚比该生亚玛撒；亚玛撒的父亲是以实玛利人益帖。
chapters.en: And Abigail bare Amasa: and the father of Amasa Jether the Ishmeelite.

chapters.zh: 希斯仑的儿子迦勒娶阿苏巴和耶略为妻，阿苏巴的儿子是耶设、朔罢、押墩。
chapters.en: And Caleb the son of Hezron begat of Azubah wife, and of Jerioth: her sons these; Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.

chapters.zh: 阿苏巴死了，迦勒又娶以法他，生了户珥。
chapters.en: And when Azubah was dead, Caleb took unto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.

chapters.zh: 户珥生乌利；乌利生比撒列。
chapters.en: And Hur begat Uri, and Uri begat Bezaleel.

chapters.zh: 希斯仑正六十岁娶了基列父亲玛吉的女儿，与他同房；玛吉的女儿生了西割；
chapters.en: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.

chapters.zh: 西割生睚珥。睚珥在基列地有二十三个城邑。
chapters.en: And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.

chapters.zh: 后来基述人和亚兰人夺了睚珥的城邑，并基纳和其乡村，共六十个。这都是基列父亲玛吉之子的。
chapters.en: And he took Geshur, and Aram, with the towns of Jair, from them, with Kenath, and the towns thereof, threescore cities. All these the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.

chapters.zh: 希斯仑在迦勒以法他死后，他的妻亚比雅给他生了亚施户；亚施户是提哥亚的父亲。
chapters.en: And after that Hezron was dead in Calebephratah, then Abiah Hezron's wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.

chapters.zh: 希斯仑的长子耶拉篾生长子兰，又生布拿、阿连、阿鲜、亚希雅。
chapters.en: And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, Ahijah.

chapters.zh: 耶拉篾又娶一妻名叫亚他拉，是阿南的母亲。
chapters.en: Jerahmeel had also another wife, whose name Atarah; she the mother of Onam.

chapters.zh: 耶拉篾长子兰的儿子是玛斯、雅悯、以结。
chapters.en: And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were, Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.

chapters.zh: 阿南的儿子是沙买、雅大。沙买的儿子是拿答、亚比述。
chapters.en: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.

chapters.zh: 亚比述的妻名叫亚比孩，亚比孩给他生了亚办和摩利。
chapters.en: And the name of the wife of Abishur Abihail, and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.

chapters.zh: 拿答的儿子是西列、亚遍；西列死了没有儿子。
chapters.en: And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.

chapters.zh: 亚遍的儿子是以示；以示的儿子是示珊；示珊的儿子是亚来。
chapters.en: And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.

chapters.zh: 沙买兄弟雅大的儿子是益帖、约拿单；益帖死了没有儿子。
chapters.en: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai; Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.

chapters.zh: 约拿单的儿子是比勒、撒萨。这都是耶拉篾的子孙。
chapters.en: And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

chapters.zh: 示珊没有儿子，只有女儿。示珊有一个仆人名叫耶哈，是埃及人。
chapters.en: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name Jarha.

chapters.zh: 示珊将女儿给了仆人耶哈为妻，给他生了亚太。
chapters.en: And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bare him Attai.

chapters.zh: 亚太生拿单；拿单生撒拔；
chapters.en: And Attai begat Nathan, and Nathan begat Zabad,

chapters.zh: 撒拔生以弗拉；以弗拉生俄备得；
chapters.en: And Zabad begat Ephlal, and Ephlal begat Obed,

chapters.zh: 俄备得生耶户；耶户生亚撒利雅；
chapters.en: And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,

chapters.zh: 亚撒利雅生希利斯；希利斯生以利亚萨；
chapters.en: And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,

chapters.zh: 以利亚萨生西斯买；西斯买生沙龙；
chapters.en: And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,

chapters.zh: 沙龙生耶加米雅；耶加米雅生以利沙玛。
chapters.en: And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.

chapters.zh: 耶拉篾兄弟迦勒的长子米沙，是西弗之祖玛利沙的儿子，是希伯仑之祖。
chapters.en: Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel , Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.

chapters.zh: 希伯仑的儿子是可拉、他普亚、利肯、示玛。
chapters.en: And the sons of Hebron; Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.

chapters.zh: 示玛生拉含，是约干之祖。利肯生沙买。
chapters.en: And Shema begat Raham, the father of Jorkoam: and Rekem begat Shammai.

chapters.zh: 沙买的儿子是玛云；玛云是伯夙之祖。
chapters.en: And the son of Shammai Maon: and Maon the father of Bethzur.

chapters.zh: 迦勒的妾以法生哈兰、摩撒、迦谢；哈兰生迦卸。
chapters.en: And Ephah, Caleb's concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.

chapters.zh: 〈 雅代的儿子是利健、约坦、基珊、毗力、以法、沙亚弗。〉
chapters.en: And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.

chapters.zh: 迦勒的妾玛迦生示别、特哈拿，
chapters.en: Maachah, Caleb's concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.

chapters.zh: 又生麦玛拿之祖沙亚弗、抹比拿和基比亚之祖示法。迦勒的女儿是押撒。
chapters.en: She bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea: and the daughter of Caleb Achsah.

chapters.zh: 迦勒的子孙就是以法他的长子、户珥的儿子，记在下面：基列耶琳之祖朔巴，
chapters.en: These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kirjathjearim,

chapters.zh: 伯利恒之祖萨玛，伯迦得之祖哈勒。
chapters.en: Salma the father of Bethlehem, Hareph the father of Bethgader.

chapters.zh: 基列耶琳之祖朔巴的子孙是哈罗以和一半米努哈人 ( 即玛拿哈人 )。
chapters.en: And Shobal the father of Kirjathjearim had sons; Haroeh, half of the Manahethites.

chapters.zh: 基列耶琳的诸族是以帖人、布特人、舒玛人、密来人，又从这些族中生出琐拉人和以实陶人来。
chapters.en: And the families of Kirjathjearim; the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.

chapters.zh: 萨玛的子孙是伯利恒人、尼陀法人、亚他绿伯约押人、一半玛拿哈人、琐利人，
chapters.en: The sons of Salma; Bethlehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.

chapters.zh: 和住雅比斯众文士家的特拉人、示米押人、苏甲人。这都是基尼人利甲家之祖哈末所生的。
chapters.en: And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, Suchathites. These the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.

chapters.zh: 大卫在希伯仑所生的儿子记在下面：长子暗嫩是耶斯列人亚希暖生的。次子但以利是迦密人亚比该生的。
chapters.en: Now these were the sons of David, which were born unto him in Hebron; the firstborn Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess:

chapters.zh: 三子押沙龙是基述王达买的女儿玛迦生的。四子亚多尼雅是哈及生的。
chapters.en: The third, Absalom the son of Maachah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith:

chapters.zh: 五子示法提雅是亚比他生的。六子以特念是大卫的妻以格拉生的。
chapters.en: The fifth, Shephatiah of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.

chapters.zh: 这六人都是大卫在希伯仑生的。大卫在希伯仑作王七年零六个月，在耶路撒冷作王三十三年。
chapters.en: six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months: and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.

chapters.zh: 大卫在耶路撒冷所生的儿子是示米亚、朔罢、拿单、所罗门。这四人是亚米利的女儿拔书亚生的。
chapters.en: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem; Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bathshua the daughter of Ammiel:

chapters.zh: 还有益辖、以利沙玛、以利法列、
chapters.en: Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,

chapters.zh: 挪迦、尼斐、雅非亚、
chapters.en: And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,

chapters.zh: 以利沙玛、以利雅大、以利法列，共九人。
chapters.en: And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.

chapters.zh: 这都是大卫的儿子，还有他们的妹子他玛，妃嫔的儿子不在其内。
chapters.en: all the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines, and Tamar their sister.

chapters.zh: 所罗门的儿子是罗波安；罗波安的儿子是亚比雅；亚比雅的儿子是亚撒；亚撒的儿子是约沙法；
chapters.en: And Solomon's son Rehoboam, Abia his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,

chapters.zh: 约沙法的儿子是约兰；约兰的儿子是亚哈谢；亚哈谢的儿子是约阿施；
chapters.en: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,

chapters.zh: 约阿施的儿子是亚玛谢；亚玛谢的儿子是亚撒利雅；亚撒利雅的儿子是约坦；
chapters.en: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,

chapters.zh: 约坦的儿子是亚哈斯；亚哈斯的儿子是希西家；希西家的儿子是玛拿西；
chapters.en: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的儿子是亚们；亚们的儿子是约西亚；
chapters.en: Amon his son, Josiah his son.

chapters.zh: 约西亚的长子是约哈难，次子是约雅敬，三子是西底家，四子是沙龙。
chapters.en: And the sons of Josiah , the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.

chapters.zh: 约雅敬的儿子是耶哥尼雅和西底家。
chapters.en: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.

chapters.zh: 耶哥尼雅被掳。他的儿子是撒拉铁、
chapters.en: And the sons of Jeconiah; Assir, Salathiel his son,

chapters.zh: 玛基兰、毗大雅、示拿萨、耶加米、何沙玛、尼大比雅。
chapters.en: Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

chapters.zh: 毗大雅的儿子是所罗巴伯、示每。所罗巴伯的儿子是米书兰、哈拿尼雅，他们的妹子名叫示罗密。
chapters.en: And the sons of Pedaiah , Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:

chapters.zh: 米书兰的儿子是哈舒巴、阿黑、比利家、哈撒底、于沙希悉，共五人。
chapters.en: And Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushabhesed, five.

chapters.zh: 哈拿尼雅的儿子是毗拉提、耶筛亚。还有利法雅的众子，亚珥难的众子，俄巴底亚的众子，示迦尼的众子。
chapters.en: And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.

chapters.zh: 示迦尼的儿子是示玛雅；示玛雅的儿子是哈突、以甲、巴利亚、尼利雅、沙法，共六人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

chapters.zh: 尼利雅的儿子是以利约乃、希西家、亚斯利干，共三人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.

chapters.zh: 以利约乃的儿子是何大雅、以利亚实、毗莱雅、阿谷、约哈难、第莱雅、阿拿尼，共七人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Elioenai , Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seven.

chapters.zh: 犹大的儿子是法勒斯、希斯仑、迦米、户珥、朔巴。
chapters.en: The sons of Judah; Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.

chapters.zh: 朔巴的儿子利亚雅生雅哈；雅哈生亚户买和拉哈。这是琐拉人的诸族。
chapters.en: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begat Jahath; and Jahath begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These the families of the Zorathites.

chapters.zh: 以坦之祖的儿子是耶斯列、伊施玛、伊得巴；他们的妹子名叫哈悉勒玻尼。
chapters.en: And these the father of Etam; Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash: and the name of their sister Hazelelponi:

chapters.zh: 基多之祖是毗努伊勒。户沙之祖是以谢珥。这都是伯利恒之祖以法他的长子户珥所生的。
chapters.en: And Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah, the father of Bethlehem.

chapters.zh: 提哥亚之祖亚施户有两个妻子：一名希拉，一名拿拉。
chapters.en: And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

chapters.zh: 拿拉给亚施户生亚户撒、希弗、提米尼、哈辖斯他利。这都是拿拉的儿子。
chapters.en: And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These the sons of Naarah.

chapters.zh: 希拉的儿子是洗列、琐辖、伊提南。
chapters.en: And the sons of Helah , Zereth, and Jezoar, and Ethnan.

chapters.zh: 哥斯生亚诺、琐比巴，并哈仑儿子亚哈黑的诸族。
chapters.en: And Coz begat Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.

chapters.zh: 雅比斯比他众弟兄更尊贵，他母亲给他起名叫雅比斯，意思说：我生他甚是痛苦。
chapters.en: And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren: and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, Because I bare him with sorrow.

chapters.zh: 雅比斯求告以色列的神说：甚愿你赐福与我，扩张我的境界，常与我同在，保佑我不遭患难，不受艰苦。神就应允他所求的。
chapters.en: And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep from evil, that it may not grieve me! And God granted him that which he requested.

chapters.zh: 书哈的弟兄基绿生米黑，米黑是伊施屯之祖。
chapters.en: And Chelub the brother of Shuah begat Mehir, which the father of Eshton.

chapters.zh: 伊施屯生伯拉巴、巴西亚，并珥拿辖之祖提欣拿，这都是利迦人。
chapters.en: And Eshton begat Bethrapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Irnahash. These the men of Rechah.

chapters.zh: 基纳斯的儿子是俄陀聂、西莱雅。俄陀聂的儿子是哈塔。
chapters.en: And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.

chapters.zh: 悯挪太生俄弗拉；西莱雅生革夏纳欣人之祖约押。他们都是匠人。
chapters.en: And Meonothai begat Ophrah: and Seraiah begat Joab, the father of the valley of Charashim; for they were craftsmen.

chapters.zh: 耶孚尼的儿子是迦勒；迦勒的儿子是以路、以拉、拿安。以拉的儿子是基纳斯。
chapters.en: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.

chapters.zh: 耶哈利勒的儿子是西弗、西法、提利、亚撒列。
chapters.en: And the sons of Jehaleleel; Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.

chapters.zh: 以斯拉的儿子是益帖、米列、以弗、雅伦。米列娶法老女儿比提雅为妻，生米利暗、沙买，和以实提摩之祖益巴。米列又娶犹大女子为妻，生基多之祖雅列，梭哥之祖希伯，和撒挪亚之祖耶古铁。
chapters.en: And the sons of Ezra , Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: And his wife Jehudijah bare Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah. And these the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh, which Mered took.

chapters.zh: 荷第雅的妻是拿含的妹子，他所生的儿子是迦米人基伊拉和玛迦人以实提摩之祖。
chapters.en: And the sons of wife Hodiah the sister of Naham, the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maachathite.

chapters.zh: 示门的儿子是暗嫩、林拿、便哈南、提伦。以示的儿子是梭黑与便梭黑。
chapters.en: And the sons of Shimon , Amnon, and Rinnah, Benhanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi , Zoheth, and Benzoheth.

chapters.zh: 犹大的儿子是示拉；示拉的儿子是利迦之祖珥，玛利沙之祖拉大，和属亚实比族织细麻布的各家。
chapters.en: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah , Er the father of Lecah, and Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea,

chapters.zh: 还有约敬、哥西巴人、约阿施、萨拉，就是在摩押地掌权的，又有雅叔比利恒。这都是古时所记载的。
chapters.en: And Jokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had the dominion in Moab, and Jashubilehem. And ancient things.

chapters.zh: 这些人都是窑匠，是尼他应和基低拉的居民；与王同处，为王做工。
chapters.en: These the potters, and those that dwelt among plants and hedges: there they dwelt with the king for his work.

chapters.zh: 西缅的儿子是尼母利、雅悯、雅立、谢拉、扫罗。
chapters.en: The sons of Simeon , Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul:

chapters.zh: 扫罗的儿子是沙龙；沙龙的儿子是米比衫；米比衫的儿子是米施玛；
chapters.en: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.

chapters.zh: 米施玛的儿子是哈母利；哈母利的儿子是撒刻；撒刻的儿子是示每。
chapters.en: And the sons of Mishma; Hamuel his son, Zacchur his son, Shimei his son.

chapters.zh: 示每有十六个儿子，六个女儿，他弟兄的儿女不多，他们各家不如犹大族的人丁增多。
chapters.en: And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.

chapters.zh: 西缅人住在别是巴、摩拉大、哈萨书亚、
chapters.en: And they dwelt at Beersheba, and Moladah, and Hazarshual,

chapters.zh: 辟拉、以森、陀腊、
chapters.en: And at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,

chapters.zh: 彼土利、何珥玛、洗革拉、
chapters.en: And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,

chapters.zh: 伯玛嘉博、哈萨苏撒、伯比利、沙拉音，这些城邑直到大卫作王的时候都是属西缅人的。
chapters.en: And at Bethmarcaboth, and Hazarsusim, and at Bethbirei, and at Shaaraim. These their cities unto the reign of David.

chapters.zh: 他们的五个城邑是以坦、亚因、临门、陀健、亚珊；
chapters.en: And their villages , Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities:

chapters.zh: 还有属城的乡村，直到巴力。这是他们的住处，他们都有家谱。
chapters.en: And all their villages that round about the same cities, unto Baal. These their habitations, and their genealogy.

chapters.zh: 还有米所巴、雅米勒、亚玛谢的儿子约沙、
chapters.en: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah,

chapters.zh: 约珥、约示比的儿子耶户；约示比是西莱雅的儿子；西莱雅是亚薛的儿子。
chapters.en: And Joel, and Jehu the son of Josibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,

chapters.zh: 还有以利约乃、雅哥巴、约朔海、亚帅雅、亚底业、耶西篾、比拿雅、
chapters.en: And Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,

chapters.zh: 示非的儿子细撒。示非是亚龙的儿子；亚龙是耶大雅的儿子；耶大雅是申利的儿子；申利是示玛雅的儿子。
chapters.en: And Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;

chapters.zh: 以上所记的人名都是作族长的，他们宗族的人数增多。
chapters.en: These mentioned by names princes in their families: and the house of their fathers increased greatly.

chapters.zh: 他们往平原东边基多口去，寻找牧放羊群的草场，
chapters.en: And they went to the entrance of Gedor, unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.

chapters.zh: 寻得肥美的草场地，又宽阔又平静。从前住那里的是含族的人。
chapters.en: And they found fat pasture and good, and the land wide, and quiet, and peaceable; for of Ham had dwelt there of old.

chapters.zh: 以上录名的人，在犹大王希西家年间，来攻击含族人的帐棚和那里所有的米乌尼人，将他们灭尽，就住在他们的地方，直到今日，因为那里有草场可以牧放羊群。
chapters.en: And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the habitations that were found there, and destroyed them utterly unto this day, and dwelt in their rooms: because pasture there for their flocks.

chapters.zh: 这西缅人中，有五百人上西珥山，率领他们的是以示的儿子毗拉提、尼利雅、利法雅，和乌薛，
chapters.en: And of them, of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.

chapters.zh: 杀了逃脱剩下的亚玛力人，就住在那里直到今日。
chapters.en: And they smote the rest of the Amalekites that were escaped, and dwelt there unto this day.

chapters.zh: 以色列的长子原是流便；因他污秽了父亲的床，他长子的名分就归了约瑟。只是按家谱他不算长子。
chapters.en: Now the sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel, (for he the firstborn; but, forasmuch as he defiled his father's bed, his birthright was given unto the sons of Joseph the son of Israel: and the genealogy is not to be reckoned after the birthright.

chapters.zh: 犹大胜过一切弟兄，君王也是从他而出；长子的名分却归约瑟。
chapters.en: For Judah prevailed above his brethren, and of him the chief ruler; but the birthright Joseph's:)

chapters.zh: 以色列长子流便的儿子是哈诺、法路、希斯伦、迦米。
chapters.en: The sons, , of Reuben the firstborn of Israel , Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.

chapters.zh: 约珥的儿子是示玛雅；示玛雅的儿子是歌革；歌革的儿子是示每；
chapters.en: The sons of Joel; Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son,

chapters.zh: 示每的儿子是米迦；米迦的儿子是利亚雅；利亚雅的儿子是巴力；
chapters.en: Micah his son, Reaia his son, Baal his son,

chapters.zh: 巴力的儿子是备拉。这备拉作流便支派的首领，被亚述王提革拉毗尼色掳去。
chapters.en: Beerah his son, whom Tilgathpilneser king of Assyria carried away : he prince of the Reubenites.

chapters.zh: 他的弟兄照著宗族，按著家谱作族长的是耶利、撒迦利雅、比拉。
chapters.en: And his brethren by their families, when the genealogy of their generations was reckoned, the chief, Jeiel, and Zechariah,

chapters.zh: 比拉是亚撒的儿子；亚撒是示玛的儿子；示玛是约珥的儿子；约珥所住的地方是从亚罗珥直到尼波和巴力免，
chapters.en: And Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, even unto Nebo and Baalmeon:

chapters.zh: 又向东延到伯拉河这边的旷野，因为他们在基列地牲畜增多。
chapters.en: And eastward he inhabited unto the entering in of the wilderness from the river Euphrates: because their cattle were multiplied in the land of Gilead.

chapters.zh: 扫罗年间，他们与夏甲人争战，夏甲人倒在他们手下，他们就在基列东边的全地，住在夏甲人的帐棚里。
chapters.en: And in the days of Saul they made war with the Hagarites, who fell by their hand: and they dwelt in their tents throughout all the east of Gilead.

chapters.zh: 迦得的子孙在流便对面，住在巴珊地，延到撒迦。
chapters.en: And the children of Gad dwelt over against them, in the land of Bashan unto Salchah:

chapters.zh: 他们中间有作族长的约珥，有作副族长的沙番，还有雅乃和住在巴珊的沙法。
chapters.en: Joel the chief, and Shapham the next, and Jaanai, and Shaphat in Bashan.

chapters.zh: 他们族弟兄是米迦勒、米书兰、示巴、约赖、雅干、细亚、希伯，共七人。
chapters.en: And their brethren of the house of their fathers , Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Jorai, and Jachan, and Zia, and Heber, seven.

chapters.zh: 这都是亚比孩的儿子。亚比孩是户利的儿子；户利是耶罗亚的儿子；耶罗亚是基列的儿子；基列是米迦勒的儿子；米迦勒是耶示筛的儿子；耶示筛是耶哈多的儿子；耶哈多是布斯的儿子。
chapters.en: These the children of Abihail the son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jeshishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz;

chapters.zh: 还有古尼的孙子、押比叠的儿子亚希。这都是作族长的。
chapters.en: Ahi the son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, chief of the house of their fathers.

chapters.zh: 他们住在基列与巴珊和巴珊的乡村，并沙仑的郊野，直到四围的交界。
chapters.en: And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in her towns, and in all the suburbs of Sharon, upon their borders.

chapters.zh: 这些人在犹大王约坦并在以色列王耶罗波安年间，都载入家谱。
chapters.en: All these were reckoned by genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.

chapters.zh: 流便人、迦得人，和玛拿西半支派的人，能拿盾牌和刀剑、拉弓射箭、出征善战的勇士共有四万四千七百六十名。
chapters.en: The sons of Reuben, and the Gadites, and half the tribe of Manasseh, of valiant men, men able to bear buckler and sword, and to shoot with bow, and skilful in war, four and forty thousand seven hundred and threescore, that went out to the war.

chapters.zh: 他们与夏甲人、伊突人、拿非施人、挪答人争战。
chapters.en: And they made war with the Hagarites, with Jetur, and Nephish, and Nodab.

chapters.zh: 他们得了神的帮助，夏甲人和跟随夏甲的人都交在他们手中；因为他们在阵上呼求神，倚赖神，神就应允他们。
chapters.en: And they were helped against them, and the Hagarites were delivered into their hand, and all that with them: for they cried to God in the battle, and he was intreated of them; because they put their trust in him.

chapters.zh: 他们掳掠了夏甲人的牲畜，有骆驼五万，羊二十五万，驴二千；又有人十万。
chapters.en: And they took away their cattle; of their camels fifty thousand, and of sheep two hundred and fifty thousand, and of asses two thousand, and of men an hundred thousand.

chapters.zh: 敌人被杀仆倒的甚多，因为这争战是出乎神。他们就住在敌人的地上，直到被掳的时候。
chapters.en: For there fell down many slain, because the war of God. And they dwelt in their steads until the captivity.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西半支派的人住在那地。从巴珊延到巴力黑们、示尼珥与黑门山。
chapters.en: And the children of the half tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the land: they increased from Bashan unto Baalhermon and Senir, and unto mount Hermon.

chapters.zh: 他们的族长是以弗、以示、以列、亚斯列、耶利米、何达威雅、雅叠，都是大能的勇士，是有名的人，也是作族长的。
chapters.en: And these the heads of the house of their fathers, even Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, heads of the house of their fathers.

chapters.zh: 他们得罪了他们列祖的神，随从那地之民的神行邪淫；这民就是神在他们面前所除灭的。
chapters.en: And they transgressed against the God of their fathers, and went a whoring after the gods of the people of the land, whom God destroyed before them.

chapters.zh: 故此，以色列的神激动亚述王普勒和亚述王提革拉毗尼色的心，他们就把流便人、迦得人、玛拿西半支派的人掳到哈腊、哈博、哈拉与歌散河边，直到今日还在那里。
chapters.en: And the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tilgathpilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, even the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh, and brought them unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river Gozan, unto this day.

chapters.zh: 利未的儿子是革顺、哥辖、米拉利。
chapters.en: The sons of Levi; Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

chapters.zh: 哥辖的儿子是暗兰、以斯哈、希伯伦、乌薛。
chapters.en: And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

chapters.zh: 暗兰的儿子是亚伦、摩西，还有女儿米利暗。亚伦的儿子是拿答、亚比户、以利亚撒、以他玛。
chapters.en: And the children of Amram; Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. The sons also of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

chapters.zh: 以利亚撒生非尼哈；非尼哈生亚比书；
chapters.en: Eleazar begat Phinehas, Phinehas begat Abishua,

chapters.zh: 亚比书生布基；布基生乌西；
chapters.en: And Abishua begat Bukki, and Bukki begat Uzzi,

chapters.zh: 乌西生西拉希雅；西拉希雅生米拉约；
chapters.en: And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,

chapters.zh: 米拉约生亚玛利雅；亚玛利雅生亚希突；
chapters.en: Meraioth begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

chapters.zh: 亚希突生撒督；撒督生亚希玛斯；
chapters.en: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Ahimaaz,

chapters.zh: 亚希玛斯生亚撒利雅；亚撒利雅生约哈难；
chapters.en: And Ahimaaz begat Azariah, and Azariah begat Johanan,

chapters.zh: 约哈难生亚撒利雅（这亚撒利雅在所罗门于耶路撒冷所建造的殿中，供祭司的职分）；
chapters.en: And Johanan begat Azariah, (he that executed the priest's office in the temple that Solomon built in Jerusalem:)

chapters.zh: 亚撒利雅生亚玛利雅；亚玛利雅生亚希突；
chapters.en: And Azariah begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

chapters.zh: 亚希突生撒督；撒督生沙龙；
chapters.en: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Shallum,

chapters.zh: 沙龙生希勒家；希勒家生亚撒利雅；
chapters.en: And Shallum begat Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begat Azariah,

chapters.zh: 亚撒利雅生西莱雅；西莱雅生约萨答。
chapters.en: And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,

chapters.zh: 当耶和华藉尼布甲尼撒的手掳掠犹大和耶路撒冷人的时候，这约萨答也被掳去。
chapters.en: And Jehozadak went , when the LORD carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

chapters.zh: 利未的儿子是革顺、哥辖、米拉利。
chapters.en: The sons of Levi; Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

chapters.zh: 革顺的儿子名叫立尼、示每。
chapters.en: And these the names of the sons of Gershom; Libni, and Shimei.

chapters.zh: 哥辖的儿子是暗兰、以斯哈、希伯伦、乌薛。
chapters.en: And the sons of Kohath , Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

chapters.zh: 米拉利的儿子是抹利、母示。这是按著利未人宗族分的各家。
chapters.en: The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. And these the families of the Levites according to their fathers.

chapters.zh: 革顺的儿子是立尼；立尼的儿子是雅哈；雅哈的儿子是薪玛；
chapters.en: Of Gershom; Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,

chapters.zh: 薪玛的儿子是约亚；约亚的儿子是易多；易多的儿子是谢拉；谢拉的儿子是耶特赖。
chapters.en: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.

chapters.zh: 哥辖的儿子是亚米拿达；亚米拿达的儿子是可拉；可拉的儿子是亚惜；
chapters.en: The sons of Kohath; Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,

chapters.zh: 亚惜的儿子是以利加拿；以利加拿的儿子是以比雅撒；以比雅撒的儿子是亚惜；
chapters.en: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son,

chapters.zh: 亚惜的儿子是他哈；他哈的儿子是乌列；乌列的儿子是乌西雅；乌西雅的儿子是少罗。
chapters.en: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

chapters.zh: 以利加拿的儿子是亚玛赛和亚希摩。
chapters.en: And the sons of Elkanah; Amasai, and Ahimoth.

chapters.zh: 亚希摩的儿子是以利加拿；以利加拿的儿子是琐菲；琐菲的儿子是拿哈；
chapters.en: Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah; Zophai his son, and Nahath his son,

chapters.zh: 拿哈的儿子是以利押；以利押的儿子是耶罗罕；耶罗罕的儿子是以利加拿；以利加拿的儿子是撒母耳。
chapters.en: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.

chapters.zh: 撒母耳的长子是约珥，次子是亚比亚。
chapters.en: And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.

chapters.zh: 米拉利的儿子是抹利；抹利的儿子是立尼；立尼的儿子是示每；示每的儿子是乌撒；
chapters.en: The sons of Merari; Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzza his son,

chapters.zh: 乌撒的儿子是示米亚；示米亚的儿子是哈基雅；哈基雅的儿子是亚帅雅。
chapters.en: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.

chapters.zh: 约柜安设之后，大卫派人在耶和华殿中管理歌唱的事。
chapters.en: And these whom David set over the service of song in the house of the LORD, after that the ark had rest.

chapters.zh: 他们就在会幕前当歌唱的差，及至所罗门在耶路撒冷建造了耶和华的殿，他们便按著班次供职。
chapters.en: And they ministered before the dwelling place of the tabernacle of the congregation with singing, until Solomon had built the house of the LORD in Jerusalem: and they waited on their office according to their order.

chapters.zh: 供职的人和他们的子孙记在下面：哥辖的子孙中有歌唱的希幔。希幔是约珥的儿子；约珥是撒母耳的儿子；
chapters.en: And these they that waited with their children. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman a singer, the son of Joel, the son of Shemuel,

chapters.zh: 撒母耳是以利加拿的儿子；以利加拿是耶罗罕的儿子；耶罗罕是以列的儿子；以列是陀亚的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,

chapters.zh: 陀亚是苏弗的儿子；苏弗是以利加拿的儿子；以利加拿是玛哈的儿子；玛哈是亚玛赛的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

chapters.zh: 亚玛赛是以利加拿的儿子；以利加拿是约珥的儿子；约珥是亚撒利雅的儿子；亚撒利雅是西番雅的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,

chapters.zh: 西番雅是他哈的儿子；他哈是亚惜的儿子；亚惜是以比雅撒的儿子；以比雅撒是可拉的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,

chapters.zh: 可拉是以斯哈的儿子；以斯哈是哥辖的儿子；哥辖是利未的儿子；利未是以色列的儿子。
chapters.en: The son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

chapters.zh: 希幔的族兄亚萨是比利家的儿子，亚萨在希幔右边供职。比利家是示米亚的儿子；
chapters.en: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, Asaph the son of Berachiah, the son of Shimea,

chapters.zh: 示米亚是米迦勒的儿子；米迦勒是巴西雅的儿子；巴西雅是玛基雅的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchiah,

chapters.zh: 玛基雅是伊特尼的儿子；伊特尼是谢拉的儿子；谢拉是亚大雅的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,

chapters.zh: 亚大雅是以探的儿子；以探是薪玛的儿子；薪玛是示每的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,

chapters.zh: 示每是雅哈的儿子；雅哈是革顺的儿子。革顺是利未的儿子。
chapters.en: The son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

chapters.zh: 他们的族弟兄米拉利的子孙，在他们左边供职的有以探。以探是基示的儿子；基示是亚伯底的儿子；亚伯底是玛鹿的儿子；
chapters.en: And their brethren the sons of Merari on the left hand: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,

chapters.zh: 玛鹿是哈沙比雅的儿子；哈沙比雅是亚玛谢的儿子；亚玛谢是希勒家的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah,

chapters.zh: 希勒家是暗西的儿子；暗西是巴尼的儿子；巴尼是沙麦的儿子；
chapters.en: The son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shamer,

chapters.zh: 沙麦是末力的儿子；末力是母示的儿子；母示是米拉利的儿子；米拉利是利未的儿子。
chapters.en: The son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

chapters.zh: 他们的族弟兄利未人也被派办神殿中的一切事。
chapters.en: Their brethren also the Levites appointed unto all manner of service of the tabernacle of the house of God.

chapters.zh: 亚伦和他的子孙在燔祭坛和香坛上献祭烧香，又在至圣所办理一切的事，为以色列人赎罪，是照神仆人摩西所吩咐的。
chapters.en: But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of the burnt offering, and on the altar of incense, for all the work of the most holy, and to make an atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

chapters.zh: 亚伦的儿子是以利亚撒；以利亚撒的儿子是非尼哈；非尼哈的儿子是亚比书；
chapters.en: And these the sons of Aaron; Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,

chapters.zh: 亚比书的儿子是布基；布基的儿子是乌西；乌西的儿子是西拉希雅；
chapters.en: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,

chapters.zh: 西拉希雅的儿子是米拉约；米拉约的儿子是亚玛利雅；亚玛利雅的儿子是亚希突；
chapters.en: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,

chapters.zh: 亚希突的儿子是撒督；撒督的儿子是亚希玛斯。
chapters.en: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.

chapters.zh: 他们的住处按著境内的营寨，记在下面：哥辖族亚伦的子孙先拈阄得地，
chapters.en: Now these their dwelling places throughout their castles in their coasts, of the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites: for theirs was the lot.

chapters.zh: 在犹大地中得了希伯仑和四围的郊野；
chapters.en: And they gave them Hebron in the land of Judah, and the suburbs thereof round about it.

chapters.zh: 只是属城的田地和村庄都为耶孚尼的儿子迦勒所得。
chapters.en: But the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

chapters.zh: 亚伦的子孙得了逃城希伯仑，又得了立拿与其郊野，雅提珥、以实提莫与其郊野；
chapters.en: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of Judah, , Hebron, of refuge, and Libnah with her suburbs, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa, with their suburbs,

chapters.zh: 希仑与其郊野，底璧与其郊野，
chapters.en: And Hilen with her suburbs, Debir with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 亚珊与其郊野，伯示麦与其郊野。
chapters.en: And Ashan with her suburbs, and Bethshemesh with her suburbs:

chapters.zh: 在便雅悯支派的地中，得了迦巴与其郊野，阿勒篾与其郊野，亚拿突与其郊野。他们诸家所得的城共十三座。
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Benjamin; Geba with her suburbs, and Alemeth with her suburbs, and Anathoth with her suburbs. All their cities throughout their families thirteen cities.

chapters.zh: 哥辖族其余的人又拈阄，在玛拿西半支派的地中得了十座城。
chapters.en: And unto the sons of Kohath, left of the family of that tribe, out of the half tribe, the half of Manasseh, by lot, ten cities.

chapters.zh: 革顺族按著宗族，在以萨迦支派的地中，亚设支派的地中，拿弗他利支派的地中，巴珊内玛拿西支派的地中，得了十三座城。
chapters.en: And to the sons of Gershom throughout their families out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

chapters.zh: 米拉利族按著宗族拈阄，在流便支派的地中，迦得支派的地中，西布伦支派的地中，得了十二座城。
chapters.en: Unto the sons of Merari by lot, throughout their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

chapters.zh: 以色列人将这些城与其郊野给了利未人。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites cities with their suburbs.

chapters.zh: 这以上录名的城，在犹大、西缅、便雅悯三支派的地中，以色列人拈阄给了他们。
chapters.en: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities, which are called by names.

chapters.zh: 哥辖族中有几家在以法莲支派的地中也得了城邑，
chapters.en: And of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.

chapters.zh: 在以法莲山地得了逃城示剑与其郊野，又得了基色与其郊野，
chapters.en: And they gave unto them, the cities of refuge, Shechem in mount Ephraim with her suburbs; also Gezer with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 约缅与其郊野，伯和仑与其郊野，
chapters.en: And Jokmeam with her suburbs, and Bethhoron with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 亚雅仑与其郊野，迦特临门与其郊野。
chapters.en: And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gathrimmon with her suburbs:

chapters.zh: 哥辖族其余的人在玛拿西半支派的地中得了亚乃与其郊野，比连与其郊野。
chapters.en: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sons of Kohath.

chapters.zh: 革顺族在玛拿西半支派的地中得了巴珊的哥兰与其郊野，亚斯他录与其郊野；
chapters.en: Unto the sons of Gershom out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, and Ashtaroth with her suburbs:

chapters.zh: 又在以萨迦支派的地中得了基低斯与其郊野，大比拉与其郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Issachar; Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 拉末与其郊野，亚年与其郊野；
chapters.en: And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs:

chapters.zh: 在亚设支派的地中得了玛沙与其郊野，押顿与其郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Asher; Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 户割与其郊野，利合与其郊野；
chapters.en: And Hukok with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs:

chapters.zh: 在拿弗他利支派的地中得了加利利的基低斯与其郊野，哈们与其郊野，基列亭与其郊野。
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Naphtali; Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kirjathaim with her suburbs.

chapters.zh: 还有米拉利族的人在西布伦支派的地中得了临摩挪与其郊野，他泊与其郊野；
chapters.en: Unto the rest of the children of Merari out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmon with her suburbs, Tabor with her suburbs:

chapters.zh: 又在耶利哥的约但河东，在流便支派的地中得了旷野的比悉与其郊野，雅哈撒与其郊野，
chapters.en: And on the other side Jordan by Jericho, on the east side of Jordan, out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with her suburbs, and Jahzah with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 基底莫与其郊野，米法押与其郊野；
chapters.en: Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:

chapters.zh: 又在迦得支派的地中得了基列的拉末与其郊野，玛哈念与其郊野，
chapters.en: And out of the tribe of Gad; Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, and Mahanaim with her suburbs,

chapters.zh: 希实本与其郊野，雅谢与其郊野。
chapters.en: And Heshbon with her suburbs, and Jazer with her suburbs.

chapters.zh: 以萨迦的儿子是陀拉、普瓦、雅述 ( 创四六13是约伯 )、伸仑，共四人。
chapters.en: Now the sons of Issachar , Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.

chapters.zh: 陀拉的儿子是乌西、利法雅、耶勒、雅买、易伯散、示母利，都是陀拉的族长，是大能的勇士。到大卫年间，他们的人数共有二万二千六百名。
chapters.en: And the sons of Tola; Uzzi, and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Jibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their father's house, , of Tola: valiant men of might in their generations; whose number in the days of David two and twenty thousand and six hundred.

chapters.zh: 乌西的儿子是伊斯拉希；伊斯拉希的儿子是米迦勒、俄巴底亚、约珥、伊示雅，共五人，都是族长。
chapters.en: And the sons of Uzzi; Izrahiah: and the sons of Izrahiah; Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Ishiah, five: all of them chief men.

chapters.zh: 他们所率领的，按著宗族出战的军队，共有三万六千人，因为他们的妻和子众多。
chapters.en: And with them, by their generations, after the house of their fathers, bands of soldiers for war, six and thirty thousand : for they had many wives and sons.

chapters.zh: 他们的族弟兄在以萨迦各族中都是大能的勇士，按著家谱计算共有八万七千人。
chapters.en: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar valiant men of might, reckoned in all by their genealogies fourscore and seven thousand.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯的儿子是比拉、比结、耶叠，共三人。
chapters.en: of Benjamin; Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.

chapters.zh: 比拉的儿子是以斯本、乌西、乌薛、耶利摩、以利，共五人，都是族长，是大能的勇士。按著家谱计算，他们的子孙共有二万二千零三十四人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Bela; Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of the house of fathers, mighty men of valour; and were reckoned by their genealogies twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.

chapters.zh: 比结的儿子是细米拉、约阿施、以利以谢、以利约乃、暗利、耶利摩、亚比雅、亚拿突、亚拉篾。这都是比结的儿子。
chapters.en: And the sons of Becher; Zemira, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jerimoth, and Abiah, and Anathoth, and Alameth. All these the sons of Becher.

chapters.zh: 他们都是族长，是大能的勇士。按著家谱计算，他们的子孙共有二万零二百人。
chapters.en: And the number of them, after their genealogy by their generations, heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour, twenty thousand and two hundred.

chapters.zh: 耶叠的儿子是比勒罕；比勒罕的儿子是耶乌施、便雅悯、以忽、基拿拿、细坦、他施、亚希沙哈。
chapters.en: The sons also of Jediael; Bilhan: and the sons of Bilhan; Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tharshish, and Ahishahar.

chapters.zh: 这都是耶叠的儿子，都是族长，是大能的勇士；他们的子孙能上阵打仗的，共有一万七千二百人。
chapters.en: All these the sons of Jediael, by the heads of their fathers, mighty men of valour, seventeen thousand and two hundred , fit to go out for war battle.

chapters.zh: 还有以珥的儿子书品、户品，并亚黑的儿子户伸。
chapters.en: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the children of Ir, Hushim, the sons of Aher.

chapters.zh: 拿弗他利的儿子是雅薛、沽尼、耶色、沙龙。这都是辟拉的子孙。
chapters.en: The sons of Naphtali; Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的儿子亚斯列是他妾亚兰人所生的，又生了基列之父玛吉。
chapters.en: The sons of Manasseh; Ashriel, whom she bare: ( his concubine the Aramitess bare Machir the father of Gilead:

chapters.zh: 玛吉娶的妻是户品、书品的妹子，名叫玛迦。玛拿西的次子名叫西罗非哈；西罗非哈但有几个女儿。
chapters.en: And Machir took to wife of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister's name Maachah;) and the name of the second Zelophehad: and Zelophehad had daughters.

chapters.zh: 玛吉的妻玛迦生了一个儿子，起名叫毗利施。毗利施的兄弟名叫示利施；示利施的儿子是乌兰和利金。
chapters.en: And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother Sheresh; and his sons Ulam and Rakem.

chapters.zh: 乌兰的儿子是比但。这都是基列的子孙。基列是玛吉的儿子，玛吉是玛拿西的儿子。
chapters.en: And the sons of Ulam; Bedan. These the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

chapters.zh: 基列的妹子哈摩利吉生了伊施荷、亚比以谢、玛拉。
chapters.en: And his sister Hammoleketh bare Ishod, and Abiezer, and Mahalah.

chapters.zh: 〈 示米大的儿子是亚现、示剑、利克希、阿尼安。〉
chapters.en: And the sons of Shemida were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.

chapters.zh: 以法莲的儿子是书提拉；书提拉的儿子是比列；比列的儿子是他哈；他哈的儿子是以拉大；以拉大的儿子是他哈；
chapters.en: And the sons of Ephraim; Shuthelah, and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eladah his son, and Tahath his son,

chapters.zh: 他哈的儿子是撒拔；撒拔的儿子是书提拉。以法莲又生以谢、以列；这二人因为下去夺取迦特人的牲畜，被本地的迦特人杀了。
chapters.en: And Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath born in land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.

chapters.zh: 他们的父亲以法莲为他们悲哀了多日，他的弟兄都来安慰他。
chapters.en: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.

chapters.zh: 以法莲与妻同房，他妻就怀孕生了一子，以法莲因为家里遭祸，就给这儿子起名叫比利亚。
chapters.en: And when he went in to his wife, she conceived, and bare a son, and he called his name Beriah, because it went evil with his house.

chapters.zh: 他的女儿名叫舍伊拉，就是建筑上伯和仑、下伯和仑与乌羡舍伊拉的。
chapters.en: (And his daughter Sherah, who built Bethhoron the nether, and the upper, and Uzzensherah.)

chapters.zh: 比利阿的儿子是利法和利悉。利悉的儿子是他拉；他拉的儿子是他罕；
chapters.en: And Rephah his son, also Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,

chapters.zh: 他罕的儿子是拉但；拉但的儿子是亚米忽；亚米忽的儿子是以利沙玛；
chapters.en: Laadan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,

chapters.zh: 以利沙玛的儿子是嫩；嫩的儿子是约书亚。
chapters.en: Non his son, Jehoshua his son.

chapters.zh: 以法莲人的地业和住处是伯特利与其村庄；东边拿兰，西边基色与其村庄；示剑与其村庄，直到迦萨与其村庄；
chapters.en: And their possessions and habitations , Bethel and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Gaza and the towns thereof:

chapters.zh: 还有靠近玛拿西人的境界，伯善与其村庄；他纳与其村庄；米吉多与其村庄；多珥与其村庄。以色列儿子约瑟的子孙住在这些地方。
chapters.en: And by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Bethshean and her towns, Taanach and her towns, Megiddo and her towns, Dor and her towns. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.

chapters.zh: 亚设的儿子是音拿、亦施瓦、亦施韦、比利亚，还有他们的妹子西拉。
chapters.en: The sons of Asher; Imnah, and Isuah, and Ishuai, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.

chapters.zh: 比利亚的儿子是希别、玛结；玛结是比撒威的父亲。
chapters.en: And the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel, who the father of Birzavith.

chapters.zh: 希别生雅弗勒、朔默、何坦，和他们的妹子书雅。
chapters.en: And Heber begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.

chapters.zh: 雅弗勒的儿子是巴萨、宾哈、亚施法。这都是雅弗勒的儿子。
chapters.en: And the sons of Japhlet; Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These the children of Japhlet.

chapters.zh: 朔默的儿子是亚希、罗迦、耶户巴、亚兰。
chapters.en: And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.

chapters.zh: 朔默兄弟希连的儿子是琐法、音那、示利斯、亚抹。
chapters.en: And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.

chapters.zh: 琐法的儿子是书亚、哈尼弗、书阿勒、比利、音拉、
chapters.en: The sons of Zophah; Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah,

chapters.zh: 比悉、河得、珊玛、施沙、益兰、比拉。
chapters.en: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.

chapters.zh: 益帖的儿子是耶孚尼、毗斯巴、亚拉。
chapters.en: And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.

chapters.zh: 乌拉的儿子是亚拉、汉尼业、利写。
chapters.en: And the sons of Ulla; Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.

chapters.zh: 这都是亚设的子孙，都是族长，是精壮大能的勇士，也是首领中的头目，按著家谱计算，他们的子孙能出战的共有二万六千人。
chapters.en: All these the children of Asher, heads of father's house, choice mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number throughout the genealogy of them that were apt to the war to battle twenty and six thousand men.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯的长子比拉，次子亚实别，三子亚哈拉，
chapters.en: Now Benjamin begat Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,

chapters.zh: 四子挪哈，五子拉法。
chapters.en: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

chapters.zh: 比拉的儿子是亚大、基拉、亚比忽、
chapters.en: And the sons of Bela were, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,

chapters.zh: 亚比书、乃幔、亚何亚、
chapters.en: And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,

chapters.zh: 基拉、示孚汛、户兰。
chapters.en: And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.

chapters.zh: 以忽的儿子作迦巴居民的族长，被掳到玛拿辖；
chapters.en: And these the sons of Ehud: these are the heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Geba, and they removed them to Manahath:

chapters.zh: 以忽的儿子乃幔、亚希亚、基拉也被掳去。基拉生乌撒、亚希忽。
chapters.en: And Naaman, and Ahiah, and Gera, he removed them, and begat Uzza, and Ahihud.

chapters.zh: 沙哈连休他二妻户伸和巴拉之后，在摩押地生了儿子。
chapters.en: And Shaharaim begat in the country of Moab, after he had sent them away; Hushim and Baara his wives.

chapters.zh: 他与妻贺得同房，生了约巴、洗比雅、米沙、玛拉干、
chapters.en: And he begat of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,

chapters.zh: 耶乌斯、沙迦、米玛。他这些儿子都是族长。
chapters.en: And Jeuz, and Shachia, and Mirma. These his sons, heads of the fathers.

chapters.zh: 他的妻户伸给他生的儿子有亚比突、以利巴力。
chapters.en: And of Hushim he begat Abitub, and Elpaal.

chapters.zh: 以利巴力的儿子是希伯、米珊、沙麦。沙麦建立阿挪和罗德二城与其村庄。
chapters.en: The sons of Elpaal; Eber, and Misham, and Shamed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof:

chapters.zh: 又有比利亚和示玛是亚雅仑居民的族长，是驱逐迦特人的。
chapters.en: Beriah also, and Shema, who heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who drove away the inhabitants of Gath:

chapters.zh: 亚希约、沙煞、耶利末、
chapters.en: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,

chapters.zh: 西巴第雅、亚拉得、亚得、
chapters.en: And Zebadiah, and Arad, and Ader,

chapters.zh: 米迦勒、伊施巴、约哈都是比利亚的儿子。
chapters.en: And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;

chapters.zh: 西巴第雅、米书兰、希西基、希伯、
chapters.en: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,

chapters.zh: 伊施米莱、伊斯利亚、约巴都是以利巴力的儿子。
chapters.en: Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;

chapters.zh: 雅金、细基利、撒底、
chapters.en: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,

chapters.zh: 以利乃、洗勒太、以列、
chapters.en: And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,

chapters.zh: 亚大雅、比拉雅、申拉都是示每的儿子。
chapters.en: And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;

chapters.zh: 伊施班、希伯、以列、
chapters.en: And Ishpan, and Heber, and Eliel,

chapters.zh: 亚伯顿、细基利、哈难、
chapters.en: And Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,

chapters.zh: 哈拿尼雅、以拦、安陀提雅、
chapters.en: And Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothijah,

chapters.zh: 伊弗底雅、毗努伊勒都是沙煞的儿子。
chapters.en: And Iphedeiah, and Penuel, the sons of Shashak;

chapters.zh: 珊示莱、示哈利、亚他利雅、
chapters.en: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,

chapters.zh: 雅利西、以利亚、细基利都是耶罗罕的儿子。
chapters.en: And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.

chapters.zh: 这些人都是著名的族长，住在耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: These heads of the fathers, by their generations, chief . These dwelt in Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 在基遍住的有基遍的父亲耶利。他的妻名叫玛迦；
chapters.en: And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; whose wife's name Maachah:

chapters.zh: 他长子是亚伯顿。他又生苏珥、基士、巴力、拿答、
chapters.en: And his firstborn son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,

chapters.zh: 基多、亚希约、撒迦、米基罗。
chapters.en: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zacher.

chapters.zh: 米基罗生示米暗。这些人和他们的弟兄在耶路撒冷对面居住。
chapters.en: And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.

chapters.zh: 尼珥生基士；基士生扫罗；扫罗生约拿单、麦基舒亚、亚比拿达、伊施巴力。
chapters.en: And Ner begat Kish, and Kish begat Saul, and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

chapters.zh: 约拿单的儿子是米力巴力 ( 撒下四章四节作米非波设 )；米力巴力生米迦。
chapters.en: And the son of Jonathan Meribbaal; and Meribbaal begat Micah.

chapters.zh: 米迦的儿子是毗敦、米勒、他利亚、亚哈斯；
chapters.en: And the sons of Micah , Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯生耶何阿达；耶何阿达生亚拉篾、亚斯玛威、心利；心利生摩撒；
chapters.en: And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,

chapters.zh: 摩撒生比尼亚；比尼亚的儿子是拉法；拉法的儿子是以利亚萨；以利亚萨的儿子是亚悉。
chapters.en: And Moza begat Binea: Rapha his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:

chapters.zh: 亚悉有六个儿子，他们的名字是亚斯利干、波基路、以实玛利、示亚利雅、俄巴底雅、哈难。这都是亚悉的儿子。
chapters.en: And Azel had six sons, whose names these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these the sons of Azel.

chapters.zh: 亚悉兄弟以设的长子是乌兰，次子耶乌施，三子是以利法列。
chapters.en: And the sons of Eshek his brother , Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.

chapters.zh: 乌兰的儿子都是大能的勇士，是弓箭手，他们有许多的子孙，共一百五十名，都是便雅悯人。
chapters.en: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sons, and sons' sons, an hundred and fifty. All these of the sons of Benjamin.

chapters.zh: 以色列人都按家谱计算，写在以色列诸王记上。犹大人因犯罪就被掳到巴比伦。
chapters.en: So all Israel were reckoned by genealogies; and, behold, they written in the book of the kings of Israel and Judah, were carried away to Babylon for their transgression.

chapters.zh: 先从巴比伦回来，住在自己地业城邑中的有以色列人、祭司、利未人、尼提宁的首领。
chapters.en: Now the first inhabitants that in their possessions in their cities , the Israelites, the priests, Levites, and the Nethinims.

chapters.zh: 住在耶路撒冷的有犹大人、便雅悯人、以法莲人、玛拿西人。
chapters.en: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim, and Manasseh;

chapters.zh: 犹大儿子法勒斯的子孙中有乌太。乌太是亚米忽的儿子；亚米忽是暗利的儿子；暗利是音利的儿子；音利是巴尼的儿子。
chapters.en: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Pharez the son of Judah.

chapters.zh: 示罗的子孙中有长子亚帅雅和他的众子。
chapters.en: And of the Shilonites; Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.

chapters.zh: 谢拉的子孙中有耶乌利和他的弟兄，共六百九十人。
chapters.en: And of the sons of Zerah; Jeuel, and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯人中有哈西努的曾孙、何达威雅的孙子、米书兰的儿子撒路，
chapters.en: And of the sons of Benjamin; Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hasenuah,

chapters.zh: 又有耶罗罕的儿子伊比尼雅，米基立的孙子、乌西的儿子以拉，伊比尼雅的曾孙、流珥的孙子、示法提雅的儿子米书兰，
chapters.en: And Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephathiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibnijah;

chapters.zh: 和他们的族弟兄，按著家谱计算共有九百五十六名。这些人都是他们的族长。
chapters.en: And their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men chief of the fathers in the house of their fathers.

chapters.zh: 祭司中有耶大雅、耶何雅立、雅斤，
chapters.en: And of the priests; Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,

chapters.zh: 还有管理神殿希勒家的儿子亚萨利雅。希勒家是米书兰的儿子；米书兰是撒督的儿子；撒督是米拉约的儿子；米拉约是亚希突的儿子。
chapters.en: And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;

chapters.zh: 有玛基雅的曾孙、巴施户珥的孙子、耶罗罕的儿子亚大雅，又有亚第业的儿子玛赛；亚第业是雅希细拉的儿子；雅希细拉是米书兰的儿子；米书兰是米实利密的儿子；米实利密是音麦的儿子。
chapters.en: And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;

chapters.zh: 他们和众弟兄都是族长，共有一千七百六十人，是善于做神殿使用之工的。
chapters.en: And their brethren, heads of the house of their fathers, a thousand and seven hundred and threescore; very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.

chapters.zh: 利未人米拉利的子孙中，有哈沙比雅的曾孙、押利甘的孙子、哈述的儿子示玛雅。
chapters.en: And of the Levites; Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;

chapters.zh: 有拔巴甲、黑勒施、迦拉，并亚萨的曾孙、细基利的孙子、米迦的儿子玛探雅，
chapters.en: And Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Micah, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;

chapters.zh: 又有耶杜顿的曾孙、迦拉的孙子、示玛雅的儿子俄巴底，还有以利加拿的孙子、亚撒的儿子比利家。他们都住在尼陀法人的村庄。
chapters.en: And Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.

chapters.zh: 守门的是沙龙、亚谷、达们、亚希幔，和他们的弟兄；沙龙为长。
chapters.en: And the porters , Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brethren: Shallum the chief;

chapters.zh: 从前这些人看守朝东的王门，如今是利未营中守门的。
chapters.en: Who hitherto in the king's gate eastward: they porters in the companies of the children of Levi.

chapters.zh: 可拉的曾孙、以比雅撒的孙子、可利的儿子沙龙，和他的族弟兄可拉人都管理使用之工，并守会幕的门。他们的祖宗曾管理耶和华的营盘，又把守营门。
chapters.en: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of the house of his father, the Korahites, over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the tabernacle: and their fathers, over the host of the LORD, keepers of the entry.

chapters.zh: 从前以利亚撒的儿子非尼哈管理他们，耶和华也与他同在。
chapters.en: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the ruler over them in time past, the LORD with him.

chapters.zh: 米施利米雅的儿子撒迦利雅是看守会幕之门的。
chapters.en: Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah porter of the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

chapters.zh: 被选守门的人共有二百一十二名。他们在自己的村庄，按著家谱计算，是大卫和先见撒母耳所派当这紧要职任的。
chapters.en: All these chosen to be porters in the gates two hundred and twelve. These were reckoned by their genealogy in their villages, whom David and Samuel the seer did ordain in their set office.

chapters.zh: 他们和他们的子孙按著班次看守耶和华殿的门，就是会幕的门。
chapters.en: So they and their children the oversight of the gates of the house of the LORD, , the house of the tabernacle, by wards.

chapters.zh: 在东西南北，四方都有守门的。
chapters.en: In four quarters were the porters, toward the east, west, north, and south.

chapters.zh: 他们的族弟兄住在村庄，每七日来与他们换班。
chapters.en: And their brethren, in their villages, to come after seven days from time to time with them.

chapters.zh: 这四个门领都是利未人，各有紧要的职任，看守神殿的仓库。
chapters.en: For these Levites, the four chief porters, were in set office, and were over the chambers and treasuries of the house of God.

chapters.zh: 他们住在神殿的四围，是因委托他们守殿，要每日早晨开门。
chapters.en: And they lodged round about the house of God, because the charge upon them, and the opening thereof every morning to them.

chapters.zh: 利未人中有管理使用器皿的，按著数目拿出拿入；
chapters.en: And of them had the charge of the ministering vessels, that they should bring them in and out by tale.

chapters.zh: 又有人管理器具和圣所的器皿，并细面、酒、油、乳香、香料。
chapters.en: of them also appointed to oversee the vessels, and all the instruments of the sanctuary, and the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.

chapters.zh: 祭司中有人用香料做膏油。
chapters.en: And of the sons of the priests made the ointment of the spices.

chapters.zh: 利未人玛他提雅是可拉族沙龙的长子，他紧要的职任是管理盘中烤的物。
chapters.en: And Mattithiah, of the Levites, who the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were made in the pans.

chapters.zh: 他们族弟兄哥辖子孙中，有管理陈设饼的，每安息日预备摆列。
chapters.en: And of their brethren, of the sons of the Kohathites, over the shewbread, to prepare every sabbath.

chapters.zh: 歌唱的有利未人的族长，住在属殿的房屋，昼夜供职，不做别样的工。
chapters.en: And these the singers, chief of the fathers of the Levites, in the chambers free: for they were employed in work day and night.

chapters.zh: 以上都是利未人著名的族长，住在耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: These chief fathers of the Levites chief throughout their generations; these dwelt at Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 在基遍住的有基遍的父亲耶利。他的妻名叫玛迦；
chapters.en: And in Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jehiel, whose wife's name Maachah:

chapters.zh: 他长子是亚伯顿。他又生苏珥、基士、巴力、尼珥、拿答、
chapters.en: And his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,

chapters.zh: 基多、亚希约、撒迦利雅、米基罗。
chapters.en: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.

chapters.zh: 米基罗生示米暗。这些人和他们的弟兄在耶路撒冷对面居住。
chapters.en: And Mikloth begat Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren at Jerusalem, over against their brethren.

chapters.zh: 尼珥生基士；基士生扫罗；扫罗生约拿单、麦基舒亚、亚比拿达、伊施巴力。
chapters.en: And Ner begat Kish; and Kish begat Saul; and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

chapters.zh: 约拿单的儿子是米力巴力 ( 即米非波设 )；米力巴力生米迦。
chapters.en: And the son of Jonathan Meribbaal: and Meribbaal begat Micah.

chapters.zh: 米迦的儿子是毗敦、米勒、他利亚、亚哈斯。
chapters.en: And the sons of Micah , Pithon, and Melech, and Tahrea, .

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯生雅拉；雅拉生亚拉篾、亚斯玛威、心利；心利生摩撒；
chapters.en: And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;

chapters.zh: 摩撒生比尼亚；比尼亚生利法雅；利法雅的儿子是以利亚萨；以利亚萨的儿子是亚悉。
chapters.en: And Moza begat Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

chapters.zh: 亚悉有六个儿子，他们的名字是亚斯利干、波基路、以实玛利、示亚利雅、俄巴底雅、哈难。这都是亚悉的儿子。
chapters.en: And Azel had six sons, whose names these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan: these the sons of Azel.

chapters.zh: 非利士人与以色列人争战，以色列人在非利士人面前逃跑，在基利波山有被杀仆倒的。
chapters.en: Now the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines, and fell down slain in mount Gilboa.

chapters.zh: 非利士人紧追扫罗和他儿子们，就杀了扫罗的儿子约拿单、亚比拿达、麦基舒亚。
chapters.en: And the Philistines followed hard after Saul, and after his sons; and the Philistines slew Jonathan, and Abinadab, and Malchishua, the sons of Saul.

chapters.zh: 势派甚大，扫罗被弓箭手追上，射伤甚重，
chapters.en: And the battle went sore against Saul, and the archers hit him, and he was wounded of the archers.

chapters.zh: 就吩咐拿他兵器的人说：你拔出刀来，将我刺死，免得那些未受割礼的人来凌辱我。但拿兵器的人甚惧怕，不肯刺他；
chapters.en: Then said Saul to his armourbearer, Draw thy sword, and thrust me through therewith; lest these uncircumcised come and abuse me. But his armourbearer would not; for he was sore afraid. So Saul took a sword, and fell upon it.

chapters.zh: 扫罗就自己伏在刀上死了。拿兵器的人见扫罗已死，也伏在刀上死了。
chapters.en: And when his armourbearer saw that Saul was dead, he fell likewise on the sword, and died.

chapters.zh: 这样，扫罗和他三个儿子，并他的全家都一同死亡。
chapters.en: So Saul died, and his three sons, and all his house died together.

chapters.zh: 住平原的以色列众人见以色列军兵逃跑，扫罗和他儿子都死了，也就弃城逃跑，非利士人便来住在其中。
chapters.en: And when all the men of Israel that in the valley saw that they fled, and that Saul and his sons were dead, then they forsook their cities, and fled: and the Philistines came and dwelt in them.

chapters.zh: 次日，非利士人来剥那被杀之人的衣服，看见扫罗和他儿子仆倒在基利波山，
chapters.en: And it came to pass on the morrow, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, that they found Saul and his sons fallen in mount Gilboa.

chapters.zh: 就剥了他的军装，割下他的首级，打发人到 ( 或作送到 ) 非利士地的四境报信与他们的偶像和众民，
chapters.en: And when they had stripped him, they took his head, and his armour, and sent into the land of the Philistines round about, to carry tidings unto their idols, and to the people.

chapters.zh: 又将扫罗的军装放在他们神的庙里，将他的首级钉在大衮庙中。
chapters.en: And they put his armour in the house of their gods, and fastened his head in the temple of Dagon.

chapters.zh: 基列雅比人听见非利士人向扫罗所行的一切事，
chapters.en: And when all Jabeshgilead heard all that the Philistines had done to Saul,

chapters.zh: 他们中间所有的勇士就起身前去，将扫罗和他儿子的尸身送到雅比，将他们的尸骨葬在雅比的橡树下，就禁食七日。
chapters.en: They arose, all the valiant men, and took away the body of Saul, and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh, and buried their bones under the oak in Jabesh, and fasted seven days.

chapters.zh: 这样，扫罗死了。因为他干犯耶和华，没有遵守耶和华的命；又因他求问交鬼的妇人，
chapters.en: So Saul died for his transgression which he committed against the LORD, against the word of the LORD, which he kept not, and also for asking of a familiar spirit, to enquire ;

chapters.zh: 没有求问耶和华，所以耶和华使他被杀，把国归于耶西的儿子大卫。
chapters.en: And enquired not of the LORD: therefore he slew him, and turned the kingdom unto David the son of Jesse.

chapters.zh: 以色列众人聚集到希伯仑见大卫，说：我们原是你的骨肉。
chapters.en: Then all Israel gathered themselves to David unto Hebron, saying, Behold, we thy bone and thy flesh.

chapters.zh: 从前扫罗作王的时候，率领以色列人出入的是你；耶和华 ─ 你的神也曾应许你说：你必牧养我的民以色列，作以色列的君。
chapters.en: And moreover in time past, even when Saul was king, thou he that leddest out and broughtest in Israel: and the LORD thy God said unto thee, Thou shalt feed my people Israel, and thou shalt be ruler over my people Israel.

chapters.zh: 于是以色列的长老都来到希伯仑见大卫王。大卫在希伯仑耶和华面前与他们立约，他们就膏大卫作以色列的王，是照耶和华藉撒母耳所说的话。
chapters.en: Therefore came all the elders of Israel to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before the LORD; and they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD by Samuel.

chapters.zh: 大卫和以色列众人到了耶路撒冷，就是耶布斯；那时耶布斯人住在那里。
chapters.en: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, which Jebus; where the Jebusites , the inhabitants of the land.

chapters.zh: 耶布斯人对大卫说：你决不能进这地方。然而大卫攻取锡安的保障，就是大卫的城。
chapters.en: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David, Thou shalt not come hither. Nevertheless David took the castle of Zion, which the city of David.

chapters.zh: 大卫说：谁先攻打耶布斯人，必作首领元帅。洗鲁雅的儿子约押先上去，就作了元帅。
chapters.en: And David said, Whosoever smiteth the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain. So Joab the son of Zeruiah went first up, and was chief.

chapters.zh: 大卫住在保障里，所以那保障叫作大卫城。
chapters.en: And David dwelt in the castle; therefore they called it the city of David.

chapters.zh: 大卫又从米罗起，四围建筑城墙，其余的是约押修理。
chapters.en: And he built the city round about, even from Millo round about: and Joab repaired the rest of the city.

chapters.zh: 大卫日见强盛，因为万军之耶和华与他同在。
chapters.en: So David waxed greater and greater: for the LORD of hosts with him.

chapters.zh: 以下记录跟随大卫勇士的首领，就是奋勇帮助他得国、照著耶和华吩咐以色列人的话、与以色列人一同立他作王的。
chapters.en: These also the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who strengthened themselves with him in his kingdom, with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.

chapters.zh: 大卫勇士的数目记在下面：哈革摩尼的儿子雅朔班，他是军长的统领，一时举枪杀了三百人。
chapters.en: And this the number of the mighty men whom David had; Jashobeam, an Hachmonite, the chief of the captains: he lifted up his spear against three hundred slain at one time.

chapters.zh: 其次是亚合人犰多的儿子以利亚撒，他是三个勇士里的一个。
chapters.en: And after him Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite, who of the three mighties.

chapters.zh: 他从前与大卫在巴斯达闵，非利士人聚集要打仗。那里有一块长满大麦的田，众民就在非利士人面前逃跑；
chapters.en: He was with David at Pasdammim, and there the Philistines were gathered together to battle, where was a parcel of ground full of barley; and the people fled from before the Philistines.

chapters.zh: 这勇士便站在那田间击杀非利士人，救护了那田。耶和华使以色列人大获全胜。
chapters.en: And they set themselves in the midst of parcel, and delivered it, and slew the Philistines; and the LORD saved by a great deliverance.

chapters.zh: 三十个勇士中的三个人下到磐石那里，进了亚杜兰洞见大卫；非利士的军队在利乏音谷安营。
chapters.en: Now three of the thirty captains went down to the rock to David, into the cave of Adullam; and the host of the Philistines encamped in the valley of Rephaim.

chapters.zh: 那时大卫在山寨，非利士人的防营在伯利恒。
chapters.en: And David then in the hold, and the Philistines' garrison then at Bethlehem.

chapters.zh: 大卫渴想，说：甚愿有人将伯利恒城门旁井里的水打来给我喝！
chapters.en: And David longed, and said, Oh that one would give me drink of the water of the well of Bethlehem, that at the gate!

chapters.zh: 这三个勇士就闯过非利士人的营盘，从伯利恒城门旁的井里打水，拿来奉给大卫。他却不肯喝，将水奠在耶和华面前，
chapters.en: And the three brake through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Bethlehem, that by the gate, and took , and brought to David: but David would not drink it, but poured it out to the LORD,

chapters.zh: 说：我的神啊，这三个人冒死去打水，这水好像他们的血一般，我断不敢喝！如此，大卫不肯喝。这是三个勇士所做的事。
chapters.en: And said, My God forbid it me, that I should do this thing: shall I drink the blood of these men that have put their lives in jeopardy? for with their lives they brought it. Therefore he would not drink it. These things did these three mightiest.

chapters.zh: 约押的兄弟亚比筛是这三个勇士的首领；他举枪杀了三百人，就在三个勇士里得了名。
chapters.en: And Abishai the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three: for lifting up his spear against three hundred, he slew , and had a name among the three.

chapters.zh: 他在这三个勇士里是最尊贵的，所以作他们的首领；只是不及前三个勇士。
chapters.en: Of the three, he was more honourable than the two; for he was their captain: howbeit he attained not to the three.

chapters.zh: 有甲薛勇士耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅行过大能的事：他杀了摩押人亚利伊勒的两个儿子，又在下雪的时候下坑里去杀了一个狮子，
chapters.en: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man of Kabzeel, who had done many acts; he slew two lionlike men of Moab: also he went down and slew a lion in a pit in a snowy day.

chapters.zh: 又杀了一个埃及人。埃及人身高五肘，手里拿著枪，枪杆粗如织布的机轴；比拿雅只拿著棍子下去，从埃及人手里夺过枪来，用那枪将他刺死。
chapters.en: And he slew an Egyptian, a man of stature, five cubits high; and in the Egyptian's hand a spear like a weaver's beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian's hand, and slew him with his own spear.

chapters.zh: 这是耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅所行的事，就在三个勇士里得了名。
chapters.en: These did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had the name among the three mighties.

chapters.zh: 他比那三十个勇士都尊贵，只是不及前三个勇士。大卫立他作护卫长。
chapters.en: Behold, he was honourable among the thirty, but attained not to the three: and David set him over his guard.

chapters.zh: 军中的勇士有约押的兄弟亚撒黑，伯利恒人朵多的儿子伊勒哈难，
chapters.en: Also the valiant men of the armies , Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,

chapters.zh: 哈律人沙玛，比伦人希利斯，
chapters.en: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite,

chapters.zh: 提哥亚人益吉的儿子以拉，亚拿突人亚比以谢，
chapters.en: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abiezer the Antothite,

chapters.zh: 户沙人西比该，亚合人以来，
chapters.en: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,

chapters.zh: 尼陀法人玛哈莱，尼陀法人巴拿的儿子希立，
chapters.en: Maharai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite,

chapters.zh: 便雅悯族基比亚人利拜的儿子以太，比拉顿人比拿雅，
chapters.en: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah, to the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite,

chapters.zh: 迦实溪人户莱，亚拉巴人亚比，
chapters.en: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,

chapters.zh: 巴路米人押斯玛弗，沙本人以利雅哈巴，
chapters.en: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite,

chapters.zh: 基孙人哈深的众子，哈拉人沙基的儿子约拿单，
chapters.en: The sons of Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shage the Hararite,

chapters.zh: 哈拉人沙甲的儿子亚希暗，吾珥的儿子以利法勒，
chapters.en: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,

chapters.zh: 米基拉人希弗，比伦人亚希雅，
chapters.en: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite,

chapters.zh: 迦密人希斯罗，伊斯拜的儿子拿莱，
chapters.en: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai,

chapters.zh: 拿单的兄弟约珥，哈基利的儿子弥伯哈，
chapters.en: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Haggeri,

chapters.zh: 亚扪人洗勒，比录人拿哈莱 〈 拿哈莱是给洗鲁雅的儿子约押拿兵器的 〉，
chapters.en: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Berothite, the armourbearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,

chapters.zh: 以帖人以拉，以帖人迦立，
chapters.en: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,

chapters.zh: 赫人乌利亚，亚莱的儿子撒拔，
chapters.en: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai,

chapters.zh: 流便人示撒的儿子亚第拿 〈 他是流便支派中的一个族长，率领三十人 〉，
chapters.en: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a captain of the Reubenites, and thirty with him,

chapters.zh: 玛迦的儿子哈难，弥特尼人约沙法，
chapters.en: Hanan the son of Maachah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite,

chapters.zh: 亚施他拉人乌西亚，亚罗珥人何坦的儿子沙玛、耶利，
chapters.en: Uzzia the Ashterathite, Shama and Jehiel the sons of Hothan the Aroerite,

chapters.zh: 提洗人申利的儿子耶叠和他的兄弟约哈，
chapters.en: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,

chapters.zh: 玛哈未人以利业，伊利拿安的儿子耶利拜、约沙未雅，摩押人伊特玛、
chapters.en: Eliel the Mahavite, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Ithmah the Moabite,

chapters.zh: 以利业、俄备得，并米琐八人雅西业。
chapters.en: Eliel, and Obed, and Jasiel the Mesobaite.

chapters.zh: 大卫因怕基士的儿子扫罗，躲在洗革拉的时候，有勇士到他那里帮助他打仗。
chapters.en: Now these they that came to David to Ziklag, while he yet kept himself close because of Saul the son of Kish: and they among the mighty men, helpers of the war.

chapters.zh: 他们善于拉弓，能用左右两手甩石射箭，都是便雅悯人扫罗的族弟兄。
chapters.en: armed with bows, and could use both the right hand and the left in stones and arrows out of a bow, of Saul's brethren of Benjamin.

chapters.zh: 为首的是亚希以谢，其次是约阿施，都是基比亚人示玛的儿子。还有亚斯玛威的儿子耶薛和毗力，又有比拉迦，并亚拿突人耶户，
chapters.en: The chief Ahiezer, then Joash, the sons of Shemaah the Gibeathite; and Jeziel, and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; and Berachah, and Jehu the Antothite,

chapters.zh: 基遍人以实买雅 〈 他在三十人中是勇士，管理他们 〉，且有耶利米、雅哈悉、约哈难，和基得拉人约撒拔、
chapters.en: And Ismaiah the Gibeonite, a mighty man among the thirty, and over the thirty; and Jeremiah, and Jahaziel, and Johanan, and Josabad the Gederathite,

chapters.zh: 伊利乌赛、耶利摩、比亚利雅、示玛利雅，哈律弗人示法提雅，
chapters.en: Eluzai, and Jerimoth, and Bealiah, and Shemariah, and Shephatiah the Haruphite,

chapters.zh: 可拉人以利加拿、耶西亚、亚萨列、约以谢、雅朔班，
chapters.en: Elkanah, and Jesiah, and Azareel, and Joezer, and Jashobeam, the Korhites,

chapters.zh: 基多人耶罗罕的儿子犹拉和西巴第雅。
chapters.en: And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.

chapters.zh: 迦得支派中有人到旷野的山寨投奔大卫，都是大能的勇士，能拿盾牌和枪的战士。他们的面貌好像狮子，快跑如同山上的鹿。
chapters.en: And of the Gadites there separated themselves unto David into the hold to the wilderness men of might, men of war for the battle, that could handle shield and buckler, whose faces the faces of lions, and as swift as the roes upon the mountains;

chapters.zh: 第一以薛，第二俄巴底雅，第三以利押，
chapters.en: Ezer the first, Obadiah the second, Eliab the third,

chapters.zh: 第四弥施玛拿，第五耶利米，
chapters.en: Mishmannah the fourth, Jeremiah the fifth,

chapters.zh: 第六亚太，第七以利业，
chapters.en: Attai the sixth, Eliel the seventh,

chapters.zh: 第八约哈难，第九以利萨巴，
chapters.en: Johanan the eighth, Elzabad the ninth,

chapters.zh: 第十耶利米，第十一末巴奈。
chapters.en: Jeremiah the tenth, Machbanai the eleventh.

chapters.zh: 这都是迦得人中的军长，至小的能抵一百人，至大的能抵一千人。
chapters.en: These of the sons of Gad, captains of the host: one of the least over an hundred, and the greatest over a thousand.

chapters.zh: 正月，约但河水涨过两岸的时候，他们过河，使一切住平原的人东奔西逃。
chapters.en: These they that went over Jordan in the first month, when it had overflown all his banks; and they put to flight all of the valleys, toward the east, and toward the west.

chapters.zh: 又有便雅悯和犹大人到山寨大卫那里。
chapters.en: And there came of the children of Benjamin and Judah to the hold unto David.

chapters.zh: 大卫出去迎接他们，对他们说：你们若是和和平平地来帮助我，我心就与你们相契；你们若是将我这无罪的人卖在敌人手里，愿我们列祖的神察看责罚。
chapters.en: And David went out to meet them, and answered and said unto them, If ye be come peaceably unto me to help me, mine heart shall be knit unto you: but if to betray me to mine enemies, seeing no wrong in mine hands, the God of our fathers look , and rebuke .

chapters.zh: 那时神的灵感动那三十个勇士的首领亚玛撒，他就说：大卫啊，我们是归于你的！耶西的儿子啊，我们是帮助你的！愿你平平安安，愿帮助你的也都平安！因为你的神帮助你。大卫就收留他们，立他们作军长。
chapters.en: Then the spirit came upon Amasai, chief of the captains, , Thine , David, and on thy side, thou son of Jesse: peace, peace unto thee, and peace to thine helpers; for thy God helpeth thee. Then David received them, and made them captains of the band.

chapters.zh: 大卫从前与非利士人同去，要与扫罗争战，有些玛拿西人来投奔大卫，他们却没有帮助非利士人；因为非利士人的首领商议，打发他们回去，说：恐怕大卫拿我们的首级，归降他的主人扫罗。
chapters.en: And there fell of Manasseh to David, when he came with the Philistines against Saul to battle: but they helped them not: for the lords of the Philistines upon advisement sent him away, saying, He will fall to his master Saul to our heads.

chapters.zh: 大卫往洗革拉去的时候，有玛拿西人的千夫长押拿、约撒拔、耶叠、米迦勒、约撒拔、以利户、洗勒太都来投奔他。
chapters.en: As he went to Ziklag, there fell to him of Manasseh, Adnah, and Jozabad, and Jediael, and Michael, and Jozabad, and Elihu, and Zilthai, captains of the thousands that of Manasseh.

chapters.zh: 这些人帮助大卫攻击群贼；他们都是大能的勇士，且作军长。
chapters.en: And they helped David against the band : for they all mighty men of valour, and were captains in the host.

chapters.zh: 那时天天有人来帮助大卫，以致成了大军，如神的军一样。
chapters.en: For at time day by day there came to David to help him, until a great host, like the host of God.

chapters.zh: 预备打仗的兵来到希伯仑见大卫，要照著耶和华的话将扫罗的国位归与大卫。他们的数目如下：
chapters.en: And these the numbers of the bands ready armed to the war, came to David to Hebron, to turn the kingdom of Saul to him, according to the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 犹大支派，拿盾牌和枪预备打仗的有六千八百人。
chapters.en: The children of Judah that bare shield and spear six thousand and eight hundred, ready armed to the war.

chapters.zh: 西缅支派，能上阵大能的勇士有七千一百人。
chapters.en: Of the children of Simeon, mighty men of valour for the war, seven thousand and one hundred.

chapters.zh: 利未支派有四千六百人。
chapters.en: Of the children of Levi four thousand and six hundred.

chapters.zh: 耶何耶大是亚伦家的首领，跟从他的有三千七百人。
chapters.en: And Jehoiada the leader of the Aaronites, and with him three thousand and seven hundred;

chapters.zh: 还有少年大能的勇士撒督，同著他的有族长二十二人。
chapters.en: And Zadok, a young man mighty of valour, and of his father's house twenty and two captains.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯支派，扫罗的族弟兄也有三千人，他们向来大半归顺扫罗家。
chapters.en: And of the children of Benjamin, the kindred of Saul, three thousand: for hitherto the greatest part of them had kept the ward of the house of Saul.

chapters.zh: 以法莲支派大能的勇士，在本族著名的有二万零八百人。
chapters.en: And of the children of Ephraim twenty thousand and eight hundred, mighty men of valour, famous throughout the house of their fathers.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西半支派，册上有名的共一万八千人，都来立大卫作王。
chapters.en: And of the half tribe of Manasseh eighteen thousand, which were expressed by name, to come and make David king.

chapters.zh: 以萨迦支派，有二百族长都通达时务，知道以色列人所当行的；他们族弟兄都听从他们的命令。
chapters.en: And of the children of Issachar, that had understanding of the times, to know what Israel ought to do; the heads of them two hundred; and all their brethren at their commandment.

chapters.zh: 西布伦支派，能上阵用各样兵器打仗、行伍整齐、不生二心的有五万人。
chapters.en: Of Zebulun, such as went forth to battle, expert in war, with all instruments of war, fifty thousand, which could keep rank: not of double heart.

chapters.zh: 拿弗他利支派，有一千军长；跟从他们、拿盾牌和枪的有三万七千人。
chapters.en: And of Naphtali a thousand captains, and with them with shield and spear thirty and seven thousand.

chapters.zh: 但支派，能摆阵的有二万八千六百人。
chapters.en: And of the Danites expert in war twenty and eight thousand and six hundred.

chapters.zh: 亚设支派，能上阵打仗的有四万人。
chapters.en: And of Asher, such as went forth to battle, expert in war, forty thousand.

chapters.zh: 约但河东的流便支派、迦得支派、玛拿西半支派，拿著各样兵器打仗的有十二万人。
chapters.en: And on the other side of Jordan, of the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and of the half tribe of Manasseh, with all manner of instruments of war for the battle, an hundred and twenty thousand.

chapters.zh: 以上都是能守行伍的战士，他们都诚心来到希伯仑，要立大卫作以色列的王。以色列其余的人也都一心要立大卫作王。
chapters.en: All these men of war, that could keep rank, came with a perfect heart to Hebron, to make David king over all Israel: and all the rest also of Israel of one heart to make David king.

chapters.zh: 他们在那里三日，与大卫一同吃喝，因为他们的族弟兄给他们预备了。
chapters.en: And there they were with David three days, eating and drinking: for their brethren had prepared for them.

chapters.zh: 靠近他们的人以及以萨迦、西布伦、拿弗他利人将许多面饼、无花果饼、干葡萄、酒、油，用驴、骆驼、骡子、牛驮来，又带了许多的牛和羊来，因为以色列人甚是欢乐。
chapters.en: Moreover they that were nigh them, unto Issachar and Zebulun and Naphtali, brought bread on asses, and on camels, and on mules, and on oxen, meat, meal, cakes of figs, and bunches of raisins, and wine, and oil, and oxen, and sheep abundantly: for joy in Israel.

chapters.zh: 大卫与千夫长、百夫长，就是一切首领商议。
chapters.en: And David consulted with the captains of thousands and hundreds, with every leader.

chapters.zh: 大卫对以色列全会众说：你们若以为美，见这事是出于耶和华 ─ 我们的神，我们就差遣人走遍以色列地，见我们未来的弟兄，又见住在有郊野之城的祭司利未人，使他们都到这里来聚集。
chapters.en: And David said unto all the congregation of Israel, If good unto you, and of the LORD our God, let us send abroad unto our brethren every where, left in all the land of Israel, and with them to the priests and Levites in their cities suburbs, that they may gather themselves unto us:

chapters.zh: 我们要把神的约柜运到我们这里来；因为在扫罗年间，我们没有在约柜前求问神。
chapters.en: And let us bring again the ark of our God to us: for we enquired not at it in the days of Saul.

chapters.zh: 全会众都说可以如此行；这事在众民眼中都看为好。
chapters.en: And all the congregation said that they would do so: for the thing was right in the eyes of all the people.

chapters.zh: 于是，大卫将以色列人从埃及的西曷河直到哈马口都招聚了来，要从基列耶琳将神的约柜运来。
